purpose: Tool-neutral image prompt for the project-level Meng Guizang multi-state character reference board.

shared_rules.format: single vertical PNG production character reference board, no visible labels or captions inside the image
shared_rules.style: low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic cloth, charred wood, paper ash, bone clips, insect wax, old relic materials, restrained cinematic lighting, readable for mobile vertical production reference
shared_rules.locked_badge_rule: Do not redesign existing faction emblems. Do not invent an Old Book Society crest, sleeve badge, bookplate logo, or personal mark. The locked Zhaoming sun-moon system may appear only as tiny broken burned archive evidence, old vermilion residue, torn seal edge, or damaged pressure mark. The locked Suming/Qingming system may appear only as small scraped insect-wax or confiscation evidence on archive fragments. No clean public emblem on clothing, book box, chest, sleeve, belt, background, or swatch.
must_have: Meng Guizang must read as a 35 to 45 year old human dead-book archivist, not elderly and not young
one half-burned eyebrow, localized ash marks on face and hands
deep grey scholar travel robe with scorched edges but complete structure
smoke-black book-box harness and portable blackened book box
chest paper clips, bone-fragment page clips, wax-sealed small pouches, old book cords, paper-yellow fragments
three states must preserve one continuous identity
no readable text, no labels, no UI, no watermark
shared_rules.negative_prompt: beggar rags, shredded clothing, full-body mud, filthy refugee, horror burn victim, old crone, immortal sage, wizard, priest, court minister, palace scholar, military commander, assassin cloak, monk robe, modern backpack, modern notebook, modern binder clip, plastic case, sci-fi archive device, steampunk gadget overload, glowing book, levitating pages, spell circle, magic aura, redesigned Zhaoming emblem, redesigned Suming emblem, redesigned Qingming badge, new Old Book Society crest, bookplate logo, clean public sun-moon emblem, black sun badge on robe, large badge on book box, banner crest, readable text, Chinese characters, Latin letters, captions, labels, UI, watermark, oversaturated game art, cyberpunk

input_images.role: existing vertical project character board layout and detail-panel density reference
existing vertical project character board material-detail and age-face reference
old relic material reference for burned archive evidence
insect-wax and confiscation material reference for archive evidence
locked Zhaoming emblem reference for broken archive residue only; do not redesign or display cleanly
locked Suming/Qingming emblem reference for damaged wax/confiscation evidence only; do not redesign or wear

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG production character reference board for Meng Guizang from the series Severed Homeland. Use the existing project character boards as layout logic: top row three full-body states of the same person, lower rows with close-up detail panels and material swatches, no visible labels or captions. Meng Guizang is a human Old Book Society dead-book archivist and Ashen Academy survivor, visually aged 35 to 45, lean and dry from long travel, precise hands from handling fragile burned fragments, wary archive-reader eyes, controlled grief, and one half-burned eyebrow from an old book-burning fire. He must not look elderly, young, royal, priestly, wizardly, military, or like a ragged beggar. Show the same Meng Guizang in three continuous states: 1) Ashen Academy guide state, complete deep grey scholar travel robe with scorched sleeve and hem edges, smoke-black book-box harness across chest and shoulders, blackened portable book box with charred corners and cord lashings, chest paper clips, bone-fragment page clips, wax-sealed small pouches, old book cords, paper-yellow fragments, localized ash on face and hands, cautious body turned toward ruined archive passages; 2) archive-reveal state, same robe and harness, book box opened or shifted forward, hands protecting bone-clipped burned pages, layered paper packets, small wax evidence pouches, charred wood dividers, cracked copper star-map dust, tiny old-vermilion seal residue and scraped insect-wax closure marks only as broken evidence, all pages unreadable; 3) marsh and flight archive-guard state, same identity under a dark reed-fiber rain overwrap or ash-damp cloak, book box tied tight to the back, cords tightened for movement, damp smoke-grey cloth, lower hem lightly mud-dulled but complete, wax pouches secured, half-burned eyebrow and ash-marked hands still visible. Include lower detail panels: adult face age lock with one half-burned eyebrow and wary eyes; ash-marked hands handling unreadable burned fragments; smoke-black book-box harness and cord lashings; bone-fragment page clips holding paper-yellow remnants; chest paper clips, wax-sealed small pouches, and old book cords; scorched deep grey scholar sleeve and hem with intact seams; broken archive evidence with partial old-vermilion seal residue and scraped insect-wax closure, not a badge; blackened book box corner with hidden compartments, paper ash, charred wood, and cord knots; material swatch strip for deep grey scholar cloth, smoke-black charred wood, char-brown burned edge, paper yellow, bone-white page clip, translucent insect wax, old vermilion stamp residue, and soot grey ash dust. Badge rule: do not redesign any faction emblem and do not invent an Old Book Society crest, sleeve badge, bookplate logo, or personal mark. Zhaoming sun-moon language may appear only as tiny broken burned archive evidence, torn seal edge, old vermilion residue, or damaged pressure mark. Suming/Qingming language may appear only as small scraped insect-wax or confiscation evidence on archive fragments. No clean public emblem on clothing, chest, sleeve, belt, book box front, background, or swatch. Low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic cloth, charred wood, paper ash, bone, wax, cracked relic material, restrained cinematic lighting, production reference clarity. No visible labels, no captions, no readable text, no Chinese characters, no Latin letters, no UI, no watermark.
prompts.negative_prompt: beggar rags, shredded clothing, full-body mud, filthy refugee, horror burn victim, old crone, immortal sage, wizard, priest, court minister, palace scholar, military commander, assassin cloak, monk robe, modern backpack, modern notebook, modern binder clip, plastic case, sci-fi archive device, steampunk gadget overload, glowing book, levitating pages, spell circle, magic aura, clean full Zhaoming emblem, clean sun-moon badge, redesigned Zhaoming emblem, redesigned Suming emblem, redesigned Qingming badge, new Old Book Society crest, bookplate logo, black sun badge on robe, white-wing black-sun badge on chest, large badge on book box, banner crest, readable text, Chinese characters, Latin letters, captions, labels, UI, watermark, oversaturated game art, cyberpunk, modern typography
